productName: Collections - Full Spectrum - Hash Rosin - Gary Payton - 1g
description: Hand-pressed hybrid rosin from Gary Payton — solventless, full-spectrum, and prized by flavor chasers for a taste that stays honest to the living bud. Golden, terpy, and gentle on the lungs — with notes of apricot, pepper, and lavender, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
